_comment: HelpDesk routing connectors. Set 'enabled: true' and ensure the named env var is set (never put credentials here). When both are true the skill can route after the developer explicitly confirms.

gmail._comment: Gmail connector — uses SMTP with an App Password (https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords). Set GMAIL_FROM to your Gmail address and GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD to the 16-char app password. Never use your account password here.
